narrative:
Cols 10-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,382 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
